title: SlopSift — An NLP linter for AI writing tells
excerpt: Catch AI writing tells with a custom-trained NLP parser—not a word list. SlopSift runs locally in your browser or CLI, with exact, explainable findings.
content_html:
Natural-language processing. Local first.

Your AI
has a
tell.

SlopSift uses a small dependency parser we trained to map the relationships between words and find canned arguments, unsupported claims, and filler.

Lint some text

draft.txt editable live NLP

Starting the local parser…

Loading the on-device NLP model…

Ln 1, Col 1stays local

corrective-antithesisunsupported-certaintymechanical-outlinevague-attributionai-vocabulary

More than a word list

It reads structure,
not vibes.

Many writing tools stop at word matching and basic parts of speech. SlopSift follows the relationships between words. Those links let each rule inspect a sentence's claim and vocabulary.

  1. 01

    Build a dependency graph

    Our custom-trained compact model maps tokens, parts of speech, and the grammatical relationships holding the sentence together.

  2. 02

    Match the construction

    Authorable rules inspect the graph for structural tells. Every finding names what matched and the exact text that triggered it.

  3. 03

    Keep judgment with the writer

    Errors are strong tells. Warnings need attention. Notes are candidates for the writer to review.

Not an API wrapper

We trained the parser for this.

SlopSift starts with a compact pretrained English encoder and trains it for parts of speech and dependency parsing. Training combines structured distillation from a larger parser with 50 controlled examples targeting grammatical relationships used by the linter. We reserved separate template families for evaluation.

16 MiB

Small enough to ship

Quantized ONNX weights run locally in Node and browser WebAssembly.

3 heads

Built for syntax

The model predicts parts of speech and the grammatical links between words.

0 uploads

Your draft stays yours

The model and deterministic rules run on-device. No remote judge reads the text.

Read how the model and CLI work

Not every em dash is slop.

error

“As an AI language model...”

caught red-handed
warning

Three paragraphs use the same canned outline.

probably slop
note

An actorless passive may be hiding responsibility.

worth a look

Meet writers where they write.

$

CLI

Glob files, lint Markdown, inspect code comments, and emit ESLint-shaped JSON in CI.

CLI docs →

AI

Agent skill

Let coding agents run the real linter, interpret its findings, and edit without flattening your voice.

Add the skill →

Yes, AI helped build this.

Built by AI.
Edited on purpose.

That is the point. SlopSift is not an AI detector and it does not pretend to know who typed a sentence. It catches vague or inflated writing. It also catches repetition and borrowed certainty. Human beings do those things too.

One command.
Several opinions.

terminal~/your-writing

Use --format json for machines, --level info for the full suspicious pile.

blocks.html_en: SlopSift uses a small dependency parser we trained to map the relationships between words and find canned arguments, unsupported claims, and filler.

blocks.html_en: SlopSift starts with a compact pretrained English encoder and trains it for parts of speech and dependency parsing. Training combines structured distillation from a larger parser with 50 controlled examples targeting grammatical relationships used by the linter. We reserved separate template families for evaluation.

sentences.en: SlopSift starts with a compact pretrained English encoder and trains it for parts of speech and dependency parsing.
sentences.zh: SlopSift 从一个紧凑的预训练英语编码器开始，并对其进行词性和依存分析的训练。

sentences.en: Training combines structured distillation from a larger parser with 50 controlled examples targeting grammatical relationships used by the linter.
sentences.zh: 训练将大型解析器的结构化蒸馏与针对 linter 使用的语法关系的 50 个受控示例相结合。

sentences.en: We reserved separate template families for evaluation.
sentences.zh: 我们保留单独的模板系列进行评估。

sentences.en: Small enough to ship
sentences.zh: 小到足以运输

blocks.html_en: Quantized ONNX weights run locally in Node and browser WebAssembly.

sentences.en: Quantized ONNX weights run locally in Node and browser WebAssembly.
sentences.zh: 量化 ONNX 权重在 Node 和浏览器 WebAssembly 中本地运行。

sentences.en: Built for syntax
sentences.zh: 专为语法而构建

blocks.html_en: The model predicts parts of speech and the grammatical links between words.

sentences.en: The model predicts parts of speech and the grammatical links between words.
sentences.zh: 该模型预测词性和单词之间的语法联系。

sentences.en: Your draft stays yours
sentences.zh: 您的草稿仍然属于您

blocks.html_en: The model and deterministic rules run on-device. No remote judge reads the text.

sentences.en: The model and deterministic rules run on-device.
sentences.zh: 模型和确定性规则在设备上运行。

sentences.en: No remote judge reads the text.
sentences.zh: 没有远程法官阅读文本。

blocks.html_en: Read how the model and CLI work

sentences.en: Read how the model and CLI work
sentences.zh: 了解模型和 CLI 的工作原理

blocks.html_en: Not every em dash is slop.

sentences.en: Not every em dash is slop.
sentences.zh: 并非每个破折号都是斜坡。

sentences.en: “As an AI language model...”
sentences.zh: “作为人工智能语言模型……”

blocks.html_en: Three paragraphs use the same canned outline.

sentences.en: Three paragraphs use the same canned outline.
sentences.zh: 三个段落使用相同的预设大纲。

blocks.html_en: An actorless passive may be hiding responsibility.

sentences.en: An actorless passive may be hiding responsibility.
sentences.zh: 无行动者的被动可能隐藏着责任。

sentences.en: Meet writers where they write.
sentences.zh: 在作家写作的地方与他们见面。

blocks.html_en: Glob files, lint Markdown, inspect code comments, and emit ESLint-shaped JSON in CI.

sentences.en: Glob files, lint Markdown, inspect code comments, and emit ESLint-shaped JSON in CI.
sentences.zh: Glob 文件、lint Markdown、检查代码注释并在 CI 中发出 ESLint 形状的 JSON。

sentences.en: Agent skill
sentences.zh: 代理技巧

blocks.html_en: Let coding agents run the real linter, interpret its findings, and edit without flattening your voice.

sentences.en: Let coding agents run the real linter, interpret its findings, and edit without flattening your voice.
sentences.zh: 让编码代理运行真正的 linter，解释其结果并进行编辑，而不会削弱您的声音。

sentences.en: Yes, AI helped build this.
sentences.zh: 是的，人工智能帮助实现了这一点。

sentences.en: Built by AI.Edited on purpose.
sentences.zh: 由 AI 构建。有意编辑。

blocks.html_en: That is the point. SlopSift is not an AI detector and it does not pretend to know who typed a sentence. It catches vague or inflated writing. It also catches repetition and borrowed certainty. Human beings do those things too.

sentences.en: That is the point.
sentences.zh: 这就是重点。

sentences.en: SlopSift is not an AI detector and it does not pretend to know who typed a sentence.
sentences.zh: SlopSift 不是人工智能检测器，它不会假装知道谁输入了句子。

sentences.en: It catches vague or inflated writing.
sentences.zh: 它可以捕捉模糊或夸大的文字。

sentences.en: It also catches repetition and borrowed certainty.
sentences.zh: 它还捕捉到重复和借用的确定性。

sentences.en: Human beings do those things too.
sentences.zh: 人类也会做这些事情。

sentences.en: One command.Several opinions.
sentences.zh: 一个命令，几种意见。

sentences.en: terminal~/your-writing
sentences.zh: 终端~/你的写作

blocks.html_en: Use --format json for machines, --level info for the full suspicious pile.

sentences.en: Use --format json for machines, --level info for the full suspicious pile.
sentences.zh: 对于机器使用 --format json，对于完整的可疑堆使用 --level info。

content_html_zh:
自然语言处理。 本地优先。

你的人工智能有能力。

SlopSift 使用我们训练过的小型依存解析器来映射单词之间的关系，并查找预设参数、不受支持的声明和填充符。

一些文本的 Lint

Draft.txt 可编辑实时 NLP

在这里尝试一下。 单击文本并输入。 当您暂停时，SlopSift 会更新。

启动本地解析器...

正在加载设备上的 NLP 模型...

Ln 1, Col 1stays local

纠正对立无支持的确定性机械大纲模糊归因词汇

不仅仅是一个单词列表

它读的是结构，而不是共鸣。

许多写作工具停留在单词匹配和基本词性上。 SlopSift 遵循单词之间的关系。 这些链接让每个规则检查句子的声明和词汇。

  1. 01构建依赖图我们定制训练的紧凑模型映射标记、词性以及将句子结合在一起的语法关系。
  2. 02匹配结构可授权的规则检查图表的结构告诉。 每个发现都会命名匹配的内容以及触发它的确切文本。
  3. 03与作者保持判断力错误是有力的说明。 警告需要引起注意。 注释是供作者审阅的候选者。

不是 API 包装器

我们为此训练了解析器。

SlopSift 从一个紧凑的预训练英语编码器开始，并对其进行词性和依存分析的训练。 训练将大型解析器的结构化蒸馏与针对 linter 使用的语法关系的 50 个受控示例相结合。 我们保留单独的模板系列进行评估。

16 MiB

小到足以运输

量化 ONNX 权重在 Node 和浏览器 WebAssembly 中本地运行。

3 heads

专为语法而构建

该模型预测词性和单词之间的语法联系。

0 uploads

您的草稿仍然属于您

模型和确定性规则在设备上运行。 没有远程法官阅读文本。

了解模型和 CLI 的工作原理

并非每个破折号都是斜坡。

CLI

Glob 文件、lint Markdown、检查代码注释并在 CI 中发出 ESLint 形状的 JSON。

CLI docs →

AI

代理技巧

让编码代理运行真正的 linter，解释其结果并进行编辑，而不会削弱您的声音。

Add the skill →

是的，人工智能帮助实现了这一点。

由 AI 构建。有意编辑。

这就是重点。 SlopSift 不是人工智能检测器，它不会假装知道谁输入了句子。 它可以捕捉模糊或夸大的文字。 它还捕捉到重复和借用的确定性。 人类也会做这些事情。

一个命令，几种意见。

终端~/你的写作

对于机器使用 --format json，对于完整的可疑堆使用 --level info。
